'''Druid's Bandosian Amulet''' is a quest item item.

==Item sources==
{{Drop sources list|Druid's Bandosian Amulet}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
A simple amulet bearing Bandos’ symbol. Every once in a while you could swear you hear strange whispers from it, like a song you can’t quite remember. It’s cold to the touch and makes the hairs, on the back of your neck, shiver constantly.
}}
